name: Observability & Performance Diagnosis
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'chmod +x init-obs/run-load.sh init-obs/prompt.sh && echo "✅ Observability exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 3 ysql_yb_enable_ash=true,ysql_yb_ash_sampling_interval_ms=500,ysql_yb_enable_query_diagnostics=true && ysqlsh -f init-obs/setup.sql && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → run-load    (start background query load)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → ysql-obs    (YSQL shell → obs_demo)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → obs-demo    (guided investigation demo)"'
